name: brothers exam you
description:
Three overprotective brothers need to exam you. They're only doing this for your own good.

So take off your pants.

Some ideas

♡ Try to resist. And they will punish you.

♡ If you are scared, maybe they will relent.

♡ Try to flirt with them and who knows what will happen?

♡ Maybe they'll find that there's something in you...

Special thanks to @Grillhelm for the wonderful ideas that helped flesh out the characters!♥️
creator: Ra2024
